load-pdf-list-acroform-fields.title: Load PDF and List AcroForm Fields
load-pdf-list-acroform-fields.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf, accessing its AcroForm, and enumerating each form field's name, type, and value.

read-acroform-fields-from-pdf-memory.title: Read AcroForm Fields from PDF Using MemoryStream
read-acroform-fields-from-pdf-memory.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF into a MemoryStream and enumerating its AcroForm fields without writing to disk, including creating a sample PDF with a text box when the source file is absent.

retrieve-acroform-fields.title: Retrieve All AcroForm Fields from a PDF
retrieve-acroform-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm collection, and enumerate all form fields, printing each field's name, value, and type.

retrieve-pdf-form-field-by-name.title: Retrieve PDF Form Field by Name
retrieve-pdf-form-field-by-name.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, accessing a form field via the Form indexer, and reading its current value.

list-form-fields-per-pdf-page.title: Iterate PDF Pages to List Form Fields
list-form-fields-per-pdf-page.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through each page, retrieves the form fields in tab order, and prints each field's name and type.

enumerate-pdf-form-fields.title: Enumerate PDF Form Fields and Log Details
enumerate-pdf-form-fields.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, and lists every form field with its name, type, and current value.

read-checkbox-value-to-boolean.title: Read Checkbox Value and Convert to Boolean
read-checkbox-value-to-boolean.description: Loads a PDF document, accesses the first checkbox field in the interactive form, reads its string Value property, and converts it to a Boolean indicating whether the box is checked.

parse-number-form-fields-from-pdf.title: Parse Number Form Fields from PDF
parse-number-form-fields-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its form fields, extracts numeric values from NumberField objects, parses them to decimal, and writes the results with a simple calculation to a text file.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, export all form fields to a JSON string using Form.ExportToJson, and output the JSON.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v2.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF document with form fields using Aspose.Pdf and exporting the form data to a UTF-8 encoded JSON file.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XML
export-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF document and saves its form fields as an XML file using Aspose.Pdf's XmlSaveOptions.

export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf.description: Loads a PDF document, accesses its form via the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form facade, and writes the form field values to an FDF file using a FileStream.

export-acroform-fields-to-xfdf.title: Export AcroForm Fields to XFDF
export-acroform-fields-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, verifying its existence, and exporting all AcroForm fields (annotations) to an XFDF file using a FileStream.

add-image-to-pdf-save-filestream.title: Add Image to PDF and Save with FileStream
add-image-to-pdf-save-filestream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, inserting an image onto the first page, and saving the result using a FileStream that is properly disposed.

modify-checkbox-appearance-extract-value.title: Modify Checkbox Appearance and Extract Its Value
modify-checkbox-appearance-extract-value.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF form checkbox's visual style and color using Aspose.PDF.Drawing, draw a custom check mark, and then read the checkbox value.

extract-pdf-form-fields.title: Extract PDF Form Fields to Dictionary
extract-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its form fields, and return a dictionary mapping each field's full name to its current value.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Files
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to process a folder of PDFs, extract each document's form data, and write the data to individual JSON files using Aspose.Pdf.

combine-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Combine PDF Form Data into a Single JSON Array
combine-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: Demonstrates loading multiple PDFs, exporting each form's fields to JSON, and merging them into a single JSON array for batch processing.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json-or-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON or XFDF
export-pdf-form-data-to-json-or-xfdf.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and exports its form fields to a JSON file or all annotations to an XFDF file based on a command‑line format flag.

extract-pdf-form-xobjects-with-logging.title: Extract PDF Form XObjects with Timestamp Logging
extract-pdf-form-xobjects-with-logging.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate through each page and form XObject, extract its text using Aspose.Pdf, and log start and end timestamps for the extraction run.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json-byte-arra.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Byte Array
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json-byte-arra.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts its form fields as JSON, writes the JSON to a MemoryStream, and returns the resulting byte array for API consumption.

export-filtered-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export Filtered PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-filtered-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Loads a PDF, selects form fields whose names start with a given prefix, extracts their values, and writes the result to a JSON file.

count-acroform-fields-in-pdf.title: Count AcroForm Fields in a PDF
count-acroform-fields-in-pdf.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, accesses the Form collection, and outputs the total number of AcroForm fields present in the document.

iterate-pdf-form-fields-set-values.title: Iterate Over PDF Form Fields and Set Values
iterate-pdf-form-fields-set-values.description: Loads a PDF, loops through each form field, displays its name and value, and sets default values based on the field type before saving the document.

retrieve-pdf-form-field-types.title: Retrieve PDF Form Field Types
retrieve-pdf-form-field-types.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access its AcroForm, iterate through each form field, and obtain the concrete runtime type of each field using GetType().

export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v3.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON via FileStream
export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v3.description: Demonstrates how to export all form fields from a PDF document directly to a JSON file using a FileStream with Aspose.Pdf's ExportToJson method.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML Using MemoryStream
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Demonstrates how to export form fields from a PDF document to an XML representation directly into a MemoryStream using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf__v2.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf__v2.description: Loads a PDF document, accesses its form via the Form facade, and writes the form fields to an FDF file using ExportFdf with proper stream disposal.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XFDF
export-pdf-form-fields-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to export form field data from a PDF document to an XFDF file via a FileStream, handling resource disposal with using blocks.

log-form-field-count-per-pdf-page.title: Log Form Field Count per PDF Page
log-form-field-count-per-pdf-page.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, count the form fields on that page, and log the counts for monitoring purposes.

extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF as Individual SVG Files
extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, detect pages with vector graphics, and export each graphic to separate SVG files using Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor.

extract-vector-graphics-from-pdf-page.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF Page to SVG Files
extract-vector-graphics-from-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, verify a page contains vector graphics, and extract each graphic as a separate SVG file using Aspose.Pdf.

combine-pdf-page-vector-graphics-into-sv.title: Combine PDF Page Vector Graphics into a Multi‑Page SVG
combine-pdf-page-vector-graphics-into-sv.description: Loads a PDF, extracts vector graphics from each page using Aspose.Pdf.Vector.SvgExtractor, wraps each page's graphics in a <g> element, and writes a single combined multi‑page SVG file.

extract-pdf-subpaths-to-png.title: Extract PDF Subpaths to Individual PNG Images
extract-pdf-subpaths-to-png.description: Shows how to use GraphicsAbsorber to capture each SubPath on PDF pages, render it on a temporary page, and save it as a separate PNG file.

export-pdf-page-as-png.title: Export PDF Page as PNG Image at Specified DPI
export-pdf-page-as-png.description: Shows how to rasterize a single PDF page to a PNG file with a defined resolution (DPI) using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-single-graphic-element-as-svg.title: Extract a Single Graphic Element from PDF as SVG
extract-single-graphic-element-as-svg.description: Shows how to load a PDF, use SvgExtractor to get vector graphics from a page, pick an element by its index, and save it as an SVG file.

extract-first-page-text-from-pdf.title: Extract First Page Text from PDF
extract-first-page-text-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract the text of the first page using TextDevice, and write it to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

extract-text-from-pdf-to-txt.title: Extract Text from PDF and Save to TXT
extract-text-from-pdf-to-txt.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, use TextAbsorber to extract text from all pages, and write the concatenated result to a .txt file.

extract-pdf-stamp-texts.title: Extract Stamp Texts from PDF
extract-pdf-stamp-texts.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its pages and annotations, extracts the visible text of StampAnnotation objects, and writes the collected strings to a JSON array.

extract-superscript-subscript-from-pdf.title: Extract Superscript and Subscript from PDF
extract-superscript-subscript-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from a PDF, identify superscript and subscript characters using font size and baseline heuristics, and write the annotated results to a text file.

extract-paragraphs-from-pdf-to-text.title: Extract Paragraphs from PDF and Save as Text
extract-paragraphs-from-pdf-to-text.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to absorb paragraph structures from a PDF, preserve line breaks, and write the extracted content to a .txt file. Includes a helper that creates a sample PDF if none exists.

extract-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's image resources, and save each image as a PNG file to an output folder.

extract-fonts-from-pdf.title: Extract Fonts from PDF and Save as TTF Files
extract-fonts-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieve all embedded fonts, and export each font to a .ttf file in a designated output folder.

extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.title: Extract PDF Tables to Separate CSV Files
extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables in a PDF and export each detected table to its own CSV file, with optional sample PDF creation.

export-acroform-fields-to-json.title: Export AcroForm Fields to JSON
export-acroform-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm, and export all form field names and values to a JSON file.

batch-extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Batch Extract Vector Graphics from PDFs to SVG
batch-extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF files in a folder, detect pages that contain vector graphics, and save each page's graphics as an SVG file using Aspose.Pdf.

parallel-pdf-text-extraction.title: Parallel PDF Text Extraction with TPL
parallel-pdf-text-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from multiple PDF files concurrently using the Task Parallel Library and Aspose.Pdf. Each file is processed in parallel and the results are stored in a thread‑safe collection.

export-pdf-to-svg-with-custom-options.title: Export PDF to SVG with Custom Options and Extract Vector Graphics
export-pdf-to-svg-with-custom-options.description: Demonstrates how to save an entire PDF as a single SVG using custom DPI and multithreading settings, and how to extract individual vector graphics from each page with configurable extraction options.

extract-large-graphics-to-svg.title: Extract and Export Large Graphics from PDF as SVG
extract-large-graphics-to-svg.description: Loads a PDF, uses GraphicsAbsorber to collect graphic elements, filters them by bounding‑box area, and saves the qualifying graphics as individual SVG files.

extract-graphics-from-pdf-pages.title: Extract Graphics from Specific PDF Pages to SVG
extract-graphics-from-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use GraphicsAbsorber and SvgExtractor to collect graphic elements from selected PDF pages and save them as SVG files.

combine-pdf-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Combine Vector Graphics from Multiple PDFs into a Single SVG
combine-pdf-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: The example loads several PDF files, extracts vector graphics from each page using Aspose.Pdf's SVG extractor, and merges all fragments into one multi‑page SVG document.

export-subpaths-as-separate-svg-images.title: Export Subpaths as Separate SVG Images
export-subpaths-as-separate-svg-images.description: Shows how to extract each subpath from a PDF page and save it as an individual SVG file with a transparent background using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-vector-graphics-from-encrypted-p.title: Extract Vector Graphics from Encrypted PDF
extract-vector-graphics-from-encrypted-p.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with a password, locate vector graphic objects, and save each graphic as a separate PDF file.

extract-vector-graphics-to-svg__v2.title: Extract Vector Graphics to SVG Preserving Coordinate System
extract-vector-graphics-to-svg__v2.description: Shows how to iterate PDF pages and save their vector graphics as SVG files while keeping the original coordinate system, using TrySaveVectorGraphics with a fallback to SvgExtractor.

pdf-summary-report-graphics-text-images.title: Generate PDF Summary Report: Graphics, Text Length, and Image Count
pdf-summary-report-graphics-text-images.description: The example loads PDF files, counts vector graphics, extracts the total length of all text, and counts embedded images, then prints a summary for each document.

extract-pdf-font-table-form-stats.title: Extract Font, Table, and Form Field Statistics from PDF
extract-pdf-font-table-form-stats.description: Loads one or more PDF files and logs the number of distinct fonts, tables, and form fields found in each document.

validate-pdf-fonts-against-system.title: Validate PDF Fonts Against System Installed Fonts
validate-pdf-fonts-against-system.description: Loads a PDF, extracts all text fragments, checks each fragment's font against the system font repository, and reports any fonts that are not installed.

retrieve-pdf-metadata-vector-graphics.title: Retrieve PDF Metadata and Count Vector Graphics
retrieve-pdf-metadata-vector-graphics.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, reading basic metadata such as title, author, subject, and keywords, and outlines where vector graphics extraction could be added.

extract-pdf-paragraphs-with-indentation-.title: Extract PDF Paragraphs with Indentation to Markdown
extract-pdf-paragraphs-with-indentation-.description: Loads a PDF, uses ParagraphAbsorber to retrieve paragraphs, calculates leading spaces from each paragraph's X‑indent, prepends those spaces to preserve indentation, and saves the result as a Markdown file.

extract-superscript-subscript-from-pdf__.title: Extract Superscript and Subscript Text from PDF
extract-superscript-subscript-from-pdf__.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, detect superscript and subscript text fragments, and output the extracted text with Unicode markers.

export-pdf-table-to-csv-with-border-mark.title: Export PDF Table to CSV with Border Markers
export-pdf-table-to-csv-with-border-mark.description: Shows how to extract tables from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber and write them to a CSV file while preserving visual border information by wrapping cell contents with delimiters.

extract-checkbox-states-to-json.title: Extract Checkbox States from PDF AcroForm to JSON
extract-checkbox-states-to-json.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its AcroForm fields, captures the checked state of each checkbox, and writes the resulting boolean list to a formatted JSON file.

extract-selected-radio-button-labels.title: Extract Selected Radio Button Labels from PDF Form
extract-selected-radio-button-labels.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its form fields, and prints the label of the selected option for each radio button field.

extract-svg-apply-brand-colors.title: Extract SVG Graphics from PDF and Apply Brand Color Transformation
extract-svg-apply-brand-colors.description: Demonstrates how to extract vector graphics as SVG from each PDF page, replace specific colors to match a brand palette, and save the transformed SVG files.
